title: British Transport Addon
description: British Transit Addon (BTA) is a collection of decorative and functional blocks for use with the MTR mod
body: # British Transit Addon British Transit Addon is a mod for Minecraft that adds a bunch of useful and decorative blocks for use with the mod Minecraft Transit Railway. # Discord Want to suggest features or interact with the community? Join our discord in the sidebar on Modrinth! # Dependencies [Minecraft Transit Railway](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-transit-railway) [Geckolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib) # FAQ **Why does my game crash when using BTA?** This is probably being caused by using the wrong version of BTA for your version of the game and mod loader. Make sure to download the correct version. If it is still crashing, please join our Discord server for support. **Can I use this mod in my modpack?** You may put this mod inside your modpack that is distributed on Modrinth, or in your private modpack for your server. Please do not reupload this mod to other websites. **Will you port this mod to MTR 3.2?** This mod will not be ported to MTR 3.2 due to the amount of effort it would take to support both versions, as well as recommendations from MTR's creator to not make any new addons for MTR 3.2. However, since the project is open source, you are free to port it to MTR 3.2 yourself Copyright © 2024 Octagon Development Code is licensed under the MIT license, textures are All Rights Reserved
